keys.description: Default grace period when no AttendancePolicy matches at any specificity.
Default late-after threshold when no policy matches.
Default freeze threshold when no policy matches.
Default rolling window for freeze threshold.
Default late-arrival penalty when no policy matches.
Hours past session.ends_at during which attendance can be edited without admin override.
Cron schedule for ReconcileAttendanceJob. Default 03:00 UTC (tenant-local resolved at job time).
Sessions past ends_at within N hours are reconciled.
Absence counts at which policy.notification_config triggers cascade notifications.
Late arrivals shorter than N minutes do not trigger LateArrivalNotification (noise suppression).
Self-kiosk + QR-scan check-ins REQUIRE device_fingerprint_hash. When false, missing fingerprint allowed (test / staging only).
Geofence validation tolerance in meters. gps_lat/gps_lng must be within (session.venue_geofence_radius + this) of the venue centre.
Max check-in attempts per (athlete, session, source) per minute.
N distinct athletes on the same device_fingerprint_hash in a rolling 24h window flags for admin review.
Years past session.ends_at at which attendance records become eligible for hard-purge. Extended to 10 with attendance_extended_retention entitlement.
Years past session.ends_at for absence records.
Late arrival rows hard-delete with their parent AttendanceRecord — no independent retention window.
